tracks.rawText: 1:19The Saboteur： Don't Do Me Wrong - Kacee Clanton [FDTjGwmGva0]UploadBlues rock with a shuffle feel, Instrumentation consists of a clean electric guitar playing syncopated rhythmic stabs and melodic fills, an upright bass playing a walking line, and a drum kit featuring a prominent ride cymbal and snare ghost notes, A female vocalist performs with a soulful, slightly raspy delivery, The tempo is 115 BPM in the key of G major, The guitar uses a light overdrive and spring reverb, The arrangement is sparse, focusing on the interplay between the vocal melody and the guitar counter-melodies3PublishRemix
tracks.title: The Saboteur： Don't Do Me Wrong - Kacee Clanton [FDTjGwmGva0]

tracks.rawText: 3:53Studio Selectionv5.5CoverCore sound: Genre-fluid sonic architecture blending reggae-dub, techno, electronic, and global rhythms, Built around groove, emotional impact, and cinematic atmosphere, designed for both dancefloor energy and deep listening experiences, Lyrics & mood: Hybrid storytelling that moves between introspection, sensuality, ambition, and transcendence, Hooks are immediate and memorable, often chant-driven, with a balance between poetic depth and viral simplicity, Production palette: Deep sub-bass, textured percussion, offbeat grooves, evolving synthscapes, and spatial FX (delay, reverb, modulation), Frequent use of contrast: minimal vs explosive, silence vs impact, analog warmth vs futuristic digital textures, Language & vocals: Bilingual flow (English/Spanish) with global accessibility, Vocals range from melodic, hypnotic singing to rhythmic, charismatic delivery, Focus on identity, tone, and presence over perfection, Artistic direction: Not bound to genres — each track is a world, Design1PublishRemix
tracks.title: Studio Selection

tracks.rawText: 4:23Studio Selectionv5.5CoverCORE SOUND (EVOLUCIÓN ELECTRO + ROCK) Genre-fluid sonic architecture blending reggae-dub, techno, electro-rock, and alternative arena energy, Driven by distorted basslines, punchy electronic drums, and cinematic rock instrumentation (electric guitars, live-feel drums, hybrid synth layers), Built around groove + impact, shifting between underground club minimalism and explosive stadium drops, ⚡ Feels like: Club at 3AM Festival mainstage Movie climax 🧠 LYRICS & MOOD (MÁS INTENSO) Hybrid storytelling moving between desire, power, rebellion, and transcendence, Hooks are: chant-driven anthemic designed for crowd response Tone: introspective in verses dominant / explosive in chorus 💥 Más actitud: Less victim → more control, dominance, identity4PublishRemix
